receive_message.long_poll: WaitTimeSeconds > 0 enables long polling; the call returns as soon as a message is available
receive_message.system_attributes_param: MessageSystemAttributeNames (the older AttributeNames parameter is deprecated and must not be sent)
receive_message.receipt_handle: the deletion/visibility token for THIS receive of the message; it must be mapped per MessageId

batch_actions.unique_ids: entry Ids must be distinct within one request or the whole call fails with BatchEntryIdsNotDistinct
batch_actions.partial_failure: an HTTP 200 response still carries a per-entry Failed list; each Failed entry has Id, SenderFault, Code, Message
batch_actions.retry_rule: retry only Failed entries with SenderFault=false, addressed by Id with the same mapped ReceiptHandle; SenderFault=true entries are reported, never retried

delete_message_batch.empty_batch: sending zero entries fails with EmptyBatchRequest, so no call may be made when there is nothing to delete

change_message_visibility_batch.purpose: extend the visibility timeout of deferred messages so they are not redelivered mid-processing
